title: Gurdwara Jand Sahib
tagline: Gurdwara Jand Sahib — heritage city of Punjab

overview.short: Jand Sahib (Punjabi: ਜੰਡ ਸਾਹਿਬ) is a village in Faridkot district, known for the historic Gurudwara of the Sikhs.
overview.description: Jand Sahib (Punjabi: ਜੰਡ ਸਾਹਿਬ) is a village in Faridkot district, known for the historic Gurudwara of the Sikhs. The history of this Gurudwara is believed to be related to Guru Gobind Singh Ji. It is located 25 km west of Faridkot City. The Postal Code of Jand Sahib is 151212.

topPlaces.name: Virewala Kalan
topPlaces.description: Virewala Kalan (Punjabi: ਵੀਰੇ ਵਾਲਾ ਕਲਾਂ) is a village located in Faridkot district of Punjab State. The Village has a population of 1139 of which 598 are males while 541 are females as per the population census of 2011.

topPlaces.name: Bhag Singh Wala
topPlaces.description: Bhag Singh Wala (Punjabi: ਭਾਗ ਸਿੰਘ ਵਾਲਾ) is a village located in the Faridkot district in the Indian state of Punjab. The village has a population of 1,025 of which 517 are males while 508 are females as per the census of 2011.

topPlaces.name: Marahar
topPlaces.description: Marahar (Punjabi: ਮਰਾੜ੍ਹ) is a village located in Faridkot district of Punjab State. The Village has a population of 1892 of which 990 are males while 902 are females as per the population census of 2011.

topPlaces.name: Pindi Balochan
topPlaces.description: Pindi Balochan is a village in Faridkot district of Punjab (India). It is situated on the outskirts of Faridkot, Muktsar and Ferozepur three districts.

topPlaces.name: Ghuduwala
topPlaces.description: Ghuduwala (Punjabi: ਘੁੱਦੂਵਾਲਾ) is a village in Faridkot district of Punjab, India. It is located right between Ferozepur, Sri Muktsar Sahib, Faridkot, and Jand Sahib.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Gurdwara Jand Sahib?
faq.a: The best time to visit Gurdwara Jand Sahib is Oct – Mar. Summers are 28–44°C and winters are 8–25°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Gurdwara Jand Sahib?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Sri Guru Ram Dass Jee International Airport, Amritsar (116 km) and the nearest railway station is Amritsar Junction (110 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Gurdwara Jand Sahib?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Gurdwara Jand Sahib at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Gurdwara Jand Sahib?
faq.a: Stays in Gurdwara Jand Sahib start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Gurdwara Jand Sahib?
faq.a: The top attractions are Virewala Kalan, Bhag Singh Wala, Marahar, Pindi Balochan, Ghuduwala.
